title: Running two podman artifact adds at the same time, fails to create both artifacts with no errors.
body:
### Issue Description

running two podman artifact add commands at the same time, is only creating one artifact.


```
$ cat /tmp/t.sh 
echo 100 > /tmp/testmodel1 
echo 300 > /tmp/testmodel2
podman artifact rm --ignore concurrent-artifact1:latest concurrent-artifact2:latest
podman artifact add --replace --type application/vnd.cnai.model.manifest.v1+json concurrent-artifact1:latest /tmp/testmodel1 &
podman artifact add --replace --type application/vnd.cnai.model.manifest.v1+json concurrent-artifact2:latest /tmp/testmodel2 &
# Wait for both to complete
wait $pid1
wait $pid2
podman artifact ls | grep concurrent
```
```
 $ sh /tmp/t.sh 
336345975eeea49ab41fdda5de584157770f8a8f1a8dcec4dd38eb4d2d89f3fd
6d4e0d585067c4e517c82c006efe644e869629942f61013a0d6de8fcdf1b1ded
71831c3c73e7aea2b153b982071b94a44eefecb78e9275f4c23b04e3a69f8037
concurrent-artifact1                latest      71831c3c73e7  Less than a second ago  4B
``


### Describe the results you received

One artifact

### Describe the results you expected

Two Artifacts
